empty_state.description: Describe your design, and AI will generate an editable canvas for you
empty_state.suggestions_hint: Tap one to fill the input, then refine it if needed.
empty_state.title: Start Designing

modes.agent_hint: Agent plans, searches, and synthesizes results step by step
modes.classic_hint: Classic keeps the current model selector and generation flow

artDirection.prompt: Before generating anything, give me an art direction for a young professional audience, including palette, typography mood, illustration or photo direction, and what visual mistakes to avoid.
artDirection.title: Art direction

campaign.prompt: I need a set of campaign assets. First plan a consistent visual system and explain how the hero visual, poster, social cover, and banner should stay aligned.
campaign.title: Campaign system

copy.prompt: Based on the keywords efficient, professional, and trustworthy, draft a poster copy structure with a headline, subheadline, 3 benefit bullets, and CTA copy suggestions.
copy.title: Copy ideas

directions.prompt: Do not generate yet. Based on the theme AI design workspace, give me 3 distinct visual directions and explain the best use case, palette, and layout focus for each one.
directions.title: 3 directions

layout.prompt: I want to make a product poster. First break down a clean layout structure and explain how the headline area, benefits area, focal visual, and CTA should be arranged.
layout.title: Layout breakdown

reference.prompt: If I provide a reference image, explain how to extract its composition, color system, and information hierarchy, then turn that into a stronger generation prompt.
reference.title: Reference remix

ecommerce.prompt: Design an ecommerce hero image that highlights a limited-time offer and core selling points, with a clear product focus and strong information hierarchy.
ecommerce.title: Ecommerce hero

invitation.prompt: Design an event invitation poster that includes the date, venue, theme, and registration details, with a polished layout and strong visual hierarchy.
invitation.title: Invitation

landing.prompt: Create a landing page hero visual with a headline, supporting subheadline, main visual, and clear CTA, using a modern SaaS style.
landing.title: Landing hero

poster.prompt: Design a futuristic tech poster for an AI design tool launch, with a bold headline, blue-cyan neon palette, dynamic motion cues, and clearly layered information blocks.
poster.title: Tech poster

product.prompt: Create a product highlight visual that emphasizes lightweight design, battery life, and premium aesthetics, suitable for a new product launch campaign.
product.title: Product highlights

social.prompt: Create a social media cover for a brand campaign, designed for channels like Xiaohongshu or WeChat, with a memorable minimal style, strong brand name, and one sharp tagline.
social.title: Social cover

placeholders: Help me design a tech-style poster...
Help me create a social media cover...
